subject: Super Potion, a glass flask or bottle containing a glowing healing liquid
description: A glass bottle or flask with a glowing golden-orange liquid inside is depicted against a warm radiant background. The bottle has a rounded base, a narrow neck, and appears to glow with an internal amber or gold light. The background radiates warm yellow-orange light outward from the bottle, giving it an almost sacred or powerful quality. The card's visual vocabulary is clean and graphic, consistent with the original Trainer card aesthetic.
foreground: glass bottle with glowing amber healing liquid
